title: papaver degenii
intro: Papaver degenii, also known as the Degen's poppy, is a species of flowering plant in the poppy family (Papaveraceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects due to the presence of alkaloids such as morphinan and noroxymorphone. The health benefits of Papaver degenii include pain relief, reduced inflammation, and improved sleep quality. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations, such as teas and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
